basic_details.job_title: GGH Machilipatnam Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 12 Cook, Ward Boy and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Cook, Ward Boy and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Government Teaching General Hospital Machilipatnam (GGH Machilipatnam) has published the Cook, Ward Boy and More Posts Notification 2026 on 11 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 12 positions across Doctor, Project Coordinator, Ward Boy, Counsellor, Peer Educator, Cook, Chowkidar, Housekeeping, and Yoga/Dance/Music/Art Teacher posts. Candidates within the age range of up to 42 years (with applicable relaxations) and holding educational qualifications ranging from 8th pass to MBBS, depending on the post, are eligible to apply offline at the official website. The application process wil

age_limit.details: The maximum age limit for all posts is 42 years. Age relaxations are applicable as follows: SC/ST/BC/EWS: 5 years Ex-servicemen: 3 years Differently-abled persons: 10 years Maximum age with all relaxations: 52 years

qualification.details: Doctor(Full Time): MBBS with registration with medical council/medical commission and should undergo training arranged by the MOSJE/NISD within 03 months of joining the IRCA. Project Coordinator cum Vocational Counsellor: Graduate with a minimum of 03 years of experience in managing such centres or demonstrable capability for running such centres and having working knowledge of computers. Ward Boy: Class 8th pass with experience of working in Hospitals/ Health Care Centers/ De-Addiction Centers. Counsellor: Graduate in social sciences preferably in Social Work/ Psychology with 1-2 years of experience in the field. Knowledge of English as well as one regional language is required. Preference will be given to candidates holding a certificate of training course in De-Addiction counseling from a recognized institution. Peer Educator: Literate, Ex-drug user with 1-2 years of sobriety, willing to work among drug-using population and having communication skills. Cook: Must be able to read and write in Telugu. Chowkidar: Must have passed 8th class and must be able to ride a bicycle. Housekeeping Work: Must be able to read and write in Telugu. Yoga Therapist/ Dance/Music/Art Teacher: Possessing experience of at least 03 years in the discipline.

selection_process: Final general merit cum rule of reservation Weightage for aggregate of marks obtained in all the years in the qualifying examination (75 marks) Weightage for experience of government services (Contract/out-sourcing service) Weightage for No. of years since passing qualifying examination
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for GGH Machilipatnam Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://krishna.ap.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GGH Machilipatnam Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for the GGH Machilipatnam Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 22-05-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the GGH Machilipatnam Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 12 vacancies available for various posts in the Government Teaching General Hospital Machilipatnam.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the GGH Machilipatnam Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required ranges from 8th pass for posts like Ward Boy and Chowkidar, up to MBBS for the Doctor post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to GGH Machilipatnam jobs?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 42 years, with relaxations available for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for GGH Machilipatnam Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post or in person.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary range for the posts advertised by GGH Machilipatnam?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 5000/- per month for some posts to Rs. 60000/- per month for the Doctor position.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I download the application form for GGH Machilipatnam Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Government Teaching General Hospital Machilipatnam, which is https://krishna.ap.gov.in/.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of necessary documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational/experience certificates as mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations for specific categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxations are provided for SC/ST/BC/EWS (5 years), Ex-servicemen (3 years), and differently-abled persons (10 years).

faq.question: Q10. How is the selection process conducted for GGH Machilipatnam jobs?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a final general merit list based on the rule of reservation, with weightage given to qualifying examination marks, government service experience, and years since passing the qualifying examination.
